name: gen-long-out
description: Decode-heavy generation: short prompts, long directed completions (normal, mean 1024 tokens, hard floor 512 and cap 2048 via max_tokens). Long-lived streams expose ITL tails, mid-stream stalls, and batching-policy trade-offs (the Sarathi-Serve TTFT/ITL axis). Output length is directed, never uncontrolled. Longer stop horizon because each request lives seconds, not milliseconds. Canonical suite v1 (IB-T003).
